title: 500 An Induction Motor As A Generator Without Altering The Motor
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
I have seen quite a few of these but most of them require you to drill out the rotor and glue in magnets - that is just not really necessary - you can make an induction motor into a generator really very easily
